narrative:
Precinct Midvale Village (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 405 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
